r_decision: single global held-out-calibrated r ≈ 3.71 (held-out r is STABLE across folds, spread 0.53 / CV 0.054; the E2.1 train-fit r-drift 9.3-wide is an ESTIMATION ARTIFACT of fitting r on optimistic train means, NOT temporal non-stationarity → do NOT condition r on period)
notes: No bucket scheme is both significant (|z|≥2) and materially different (max|Δρ|≥0.04); a single global ρ is the simplest fit.
